results.title: ‘She’s straight down the barrel’: Joyce defends Pauline Hanson as polls show support for One Nation slipping - 7NEWS
results.description: ‘She’s straight down the barrel’: Joyce defends Pauline Hanson as polls show support for One Nation slipping 7NEWS Even with One Nation support dropping, state Labor still has reason to worry ahead of November The Age Another poll shows One Nation’s surge has turned around. Has the party peaked? The Conversation Fresh polling puts One Nation ahead in Victoria The Australian One Nation down slightly as Hanson’s personal rating slides DemosAU

results.title: Who is John Mark Calilung, the first witness in Sara Duterte’s impeachment trial?
results.description: The first witness to take the stand in the impeachment trial of Vice President Sara Duterte was John Mark Calilung, a 31-year-old senior agent of the National Bureau of Investigation (NBI).
